description_long: This house features a raised foundation supported by multiple pillars, with a wide wraparound porch bordered by white railings. The main structure is topped with a large, red, hip-style roof, while a modern, boxy second story with a flat roof sits above the center, featuring large windows and a rooftop terrace. The exterior walls of the upper story are gray, contrasting with the white and beige tones of the lower level. The front entryway is accessed by a broad staircase leading up to the porch, which is furnished with outdoor seating and potted plants. Multiple large windows provide ample natural light, and the house includes both open and enclosed outdoor spaces. The overall design blends traditional porch elements with modern, minimalist upper-story architecture.
description: A two-story house with a red hip roof, wraparound porch, and a modern, boxy upper level with large windows and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, porch, and central entryway beneath the red roof, with the modern upper story and rooftop terrace visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, open railing, and large windows on both levels, with visible plants and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area, additional seating, and the upper story's flat roof and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended porch, railing, and a side door, with the upper story's windows and terrace visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a covered porch with railings, wide entry door, and decorative columns.
